command.lovely_sparkle_pieces.souldata.s: Successfully %2$s %3$s souls for player %1$s. Current souls: %4$d
lsp.newbie.newbie1: Is that all you can do? How disappointing.
lsp.newbie.newbie10: You died like a joke, what a waste of my time.
lsp.newbie.newbie4: The show's starting, but you're destined to be a spectator.
lsp.newbie.newbie5: You think you can win? What a joke!
lsp.newbie.newbie6: Losing such a simple challenge, how embarrassing.
lsp.newbie.newbie8: You died so easily, looks like you weren't ready at all.
lsp.newbie.newbie9: I can't believe I have to clean up after such a noob.
message.lsp.welcome: [Sparkling Trinkets] Thank you for installing and playing this mod.
message.lsp.welcome1: [Sparkling Trinkets] This mod follows the CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 license, prohibiting commercial use.
message.lsp.welcome2: [Sparkling Trinkets] If the modpack you are playing was obtained for a fee.
message.lsp.welcome3: [Sparkling Trinkets] Please curse the resellers who sold the modpack!
msg.lsp.cant_sleep: Desecrating the gods makes you uneasy.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.binoculars: Better than regular binoculars, with a wider and clearer field of view.
But it cannot be used to complete achievements because it is not a 'Spyglass'.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.blade_boot: The front of the boot has a device that can eject blades.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.des: Desecrate the gods in exchange for powerful strength.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.des2: Divine punishment from the gods follows immediately.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.punish7: ·§4Once the contract is made, it cannot be undone (trinkets cannot be removed).
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.reward4: ·§225% chance to drain 4 health on attack (reduced to 1 due to punishment).
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bsh.des1: Immune to damage from Magma Blocks and Basalt.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bsh.des2: Not immune to lava and fire..
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.cat_boot_d: Allows you to double jump, but cancels sprint status.
Only once, cannot jump on your own foot to ascend to the sky!
Attacks have a chance to deal 1.75x damage.
Critical hits are calculated after most damage bonuses; indirect damage may not crit.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.crush_ston: Allows you to break blocks faster.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.ender_ring: Can open the Ender Chest at any time.
Bind your hotkey in the settings!
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.flowerboot: The places you walk become vibrant.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.fox_boot.b: Makes you jump higher, like a fox hunting.
The bonus allows you to jump about 3.3 blocks high. The calculation formula is very complex, and you wouldn't want to know it.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.fpseye.bas: Dynamically adjusts attack damage based on frame rate.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gamblers_c: When critically hitting: 50% chance for +25% damage, 50% chance for -25% damage.
If you have chips, critical hits consume 2 chips.
Increases the chance of increased damage to 75%.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gamblers_d: Randomly gain 1-6 chips per unit killed.
Luck modifies the amount gained; +1 per point of Luck.
The decimal part of Luck is calculated probabilistically, meaning 0.7 Luck has a 70% chance to modify by +1.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gamblers_e: When health is below 25%, 0.5 chance to be a timely help, 0.5 chance to add fuel to the fire.
If you have at least 200 chips, the positive:negative probability ratio changes to 0.75:0.25.
Triggering the effect thereafter consumes 10 chips.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gamblers_g: Luck will give you an advantage when rolling dice~
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gamblers_p: Every 30s, randomly 50% chance to gain Strength or Weakness for 12s.
If you have chips, each time consumes 5 chips.
Increases the chance of gaining Strength to 75%.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.magna.des: Allows you to stay in lava and fire for a period.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.magna.des2: Time will slowly recover once you leave lava and fire.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.magnetic.d: Attracts nearby dropped items and experience orbs.
Even if those items are not iron, cobalt, or nickel.
Opposites attract, likes repel, so the ring must be female.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.lsp_memory: Modifies damage based on allocated memory.
Higher memory, lower damage; lower memory, higher damage.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.night_ring: The later the (real) time, the higher the attack bonus.
Of course, you can keep changing your system time; I can't stop you anyway.
Reaches maximum 75% at 2 AM, minimum -75% at 2 PM.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.np_desp2: ◆ Soul Butterflies will orbit around you.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.np_desp3: ◆ Disappears after dealing 8 damage per attack.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.np_desp4: ◆ A maximum of 3 Soul Butterflies can exist simultaneously.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.np_desp5: ◆ Soul Butterflies are invincible | Can be actively cleared by attacking with 'Underworld Butterfly Whisper'.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.np_desp6: ◆ Soul Butterflies will automatically track and attack nearby monsters.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.polymeriza: Possesses the ability to combine several trinkets.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.rabbit_boo: Still as a maiden, agile as a rabbit.
Unlike a hopping rabbit, you run.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.soul_torch: Right-click any location where you want to place a light source.
Consumes 1 Soul to place a luminous body.
The luminous body will not drop anything when destroyed.
Whose soul will illuminate your path forward?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.steel_plat: Sheep hooves are pretty hard, aren't they?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.straw_sand: Wear straw sandals, feel like flying!
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.unique: Unique enchantments will appear at Enchanting Level 35.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.unreliable: Enchanting table preview information will no longer be reliable.
Consumes 1 Soul per arrow fired, no normal arrows consumed.
Usable even without arrows in inventory.
tooltip.set_bonus.title: Set Bonus
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.inferno_ri: Don't worry, it only matches loot tables.
“You can't discard four different suits to deal fire damage.”
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.flame_soul: Hold to continuously fire soul flames, incinerating enemies in front.
Deals 5 magic damage and ignites targets for 4 seconds.
tooltiplovely_sparkle_pieces.flame_soul_: Consumes 2 souls per second while channeling.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.flame_soul: Maximum range of 8 blocks, can penetrate.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.ecoring.de: “Shanxi people obtain coal by beating Wither Skeletons.”
Killing Wither Skeletons drops an additional 8-12 coal.
But you can no longer get coal by mining coal ore.
Once equipped, you can only unequip it near a trinket workbench.
item.lovely_sparkle_pieces.boundary_ston: No Anchor Set. Shift + Right-Click to Set.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.domain_sto: After setting an anchor, you can teleport back to the anchor.
Requires 4 seconds of continuous charge, consumes one durability after teleporting.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.blaze_core: Gain 10 temperature every time you deal fire damage.
If temperature is less than 50, fire damage increases by 15%.
If temperature is greater than 50 but less than 100, fire damage increases by 25%.
If temperature is greater than 100, fire damage increases by 50%.
When temperature reaches 150, enter overheating state, start cooling down, fire damage reduced by 100%.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.polymeriza: This is an enhanced version, capable of synthesizing more powerful trinkets.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.capitalist: Every 4 seconds, absorbs one iron ingot from surrounding Iron Golems.
Each absorption consumes 25 health from the Iron Golem.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.eyemask.de: Lets you cosplay as Xiahou Dun.
Honestly, decorative effect is 7 and a half stars.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.yellow_hea: The sky is dead, the yellow sky shall rise!
The year is Jiazi, all is auspicious!
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.fpseye.bas: I've long been annoyed by you 'Card Bar' guys, take this strike from the 'Map Bar'!
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bsh.des3: Although it looks like obsidian, it's really not.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.night_visi: Hmm... just like most monocular night vision devices.
You should learn to tolerate that damn limited field of view.
This means you can stay underwater longer.
Is it cute jellyfish helping you breathe?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.capitalist: Iron Golems that die this way will drop a small cake.
The one who moved the capitalist's cake (maybe not a person) has been found.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.poseidon.d: Breathe freely in water and enhance underwater movement.
Blessed by Poseidon, perhaps, certainly not Yuan Hua.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.marksman.d: Projectiles you fire deal 10% more damage.
Originally wanted to render a cool UI on the screen.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.witchhat.d: Honestly, witch hats are all designed like this.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bigrock.de: Makes you heavy and less susceptible to knockback.
But you also fall faster, which may prevent you from jumping.
In this case, it is not recommended for users to ride helicopters.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.pocket_wat: Otherwise, do you want time to accelerate?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.mermaid_ta: Allows you to move freely in water.
I'm curious how you put the tail on your body?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.leather_qu: Your launchers (bows, crossbows, etc.) have a 25% chance not to consume ammo.
As for firearms? I don't know, I only modified launcher items.
The most basic critical hit item.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.crush_ston: Why is it called 'Crusher' when it speeds up any block?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.ender_ring: For many modpacks, this item is actually not very useful.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.lsp_memory: Take this blow from my only 1333MHz DDR3-2G memory!
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.night_ring: But you still need to rest well.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.magnetic.d: This has stronger suction than regular rings.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.double_nig: Wider field of view, clearer colors.
But the cost will also increase.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.quarter_ni: Hardly affects the field of view much.
curios.modifiers.unlegendarycurios: When the pact might be formed:
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.desx: Disregard the gods in exchange for non-existent power.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.des2x: The gods will not inflict divine punishment; they don't even care.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.punish7: ·§4Once the contract is made, it can be undone at any time (trinkets can be removed).
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.bs.reward4: ·§20% chance to drain 0 health on attack (reduced to 0 due to punishment).
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.golden_hoo: Has a chance to fish up extra treasure when fishing.
Why can't you fish up treasure without a hook?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gps.des1: Displays time, location, and your movement speed.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.gps.des2: As for whether it needs charging, this mod doesn't have an energy system anyway.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.hqfl.des2: Time for fish to bite reduced by 16.6666667%.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.hqfl.des3: Actually, it just speeds up the bite count by 20%.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.pda.des1: Displays time, coordinates, weather conditions, and moon phase at night.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.pda.des2: Displays your movement speed and your heart rate?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.pda.des3: To be precise, it's Steve's heart rate, not the player's.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.position.d: You're probably wondering why this takes up a trinket slot.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.speedomete: Displays your speed, and the icon changes based on movement state.
Install modern UI for better emoji support.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.magna.des3: Fulfills your wish to swim in lava~ for a short while.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.newbie.des: No longer drops items everywhere upon death.
Provides newbies with the protection they deserve.
However, the ice generated is more solid.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.icewalk.de: The ice blocks under your feet become more solid.
No slipping when walking on it.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.jumping.ba: Immune to fall damage and allows double jumping.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.jumping.de: Sounds like a combination of two trinkets.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.windleap.d: One push of the gas pedal can send you two miles away.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.skybeast.b: Runs fast, jumps high, immune to fall damage, and can double jump.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.skybeast.d: Why does it look like a frog...?
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.pda.des5: PDA stands for Personal Digital Assistant.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.flowerboot: Sand rehydrates, dirt sprouts anew, weeds proliferate.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.adventurer: The farther from the world origin, the higher the damage.
Even without souls, there's a 50% chance not to consume normal arrows.
tooltip.lovely_sparkle_pieces.woodgrain_: Launchers have a 40% chance not to consume arrows.
Arrows are finely tuned for greater accuracy.
